items.raw_desc: Fényprojektor Cloud b Dream Buddies Benny the Bunny nyuszi:A Cloud b Dream Buddies Benny the Bunny projektor a kicsik barátja, mert segít nekik leküzdeni a sötétségtől való félelmüket. Ez az imádnivaló plüssnyúl a szoba mennyezetére és falára vetíti a csillagos eget, így a gyerekek nagyobb biztonságban érezhetik magukat, és kevésbé félnek a sötétben. Players try to build the building according to the plan, but they are limited. One of the players sees the plan of the building, but cannot speak, only gesticulate. The second player watches his gestures and tries to translate them into spoken form to guide the third player. He keeps his eyes closed and builds according to verbal instructions.
